name: OpenLibrary — smoke test (non-mutating health check)
description: Showcases: 'when' conditional guards and a lightweight read-only health check. Verifies login, search, and performance without mutating the shelf. The screenshot step only fires when search actually returned books (when: context_key_exists). The final assert proves the shelf count was unchanged throughout.

steps.description: Baseline: record current shelf count before any actions (must remain unchanged at the end)
Smoke: verify search API returns at least 1 result for '{{query}}' (no add — collect only)
Capture search results — only runs when search actually returned books (when guard demo)
Proof the shelf was never mutated — count must equal baseline (delta=0)
